errors.imageInputNotVerifiedByProvider: Provider "{{providerName}}" does not have an officially verified image-input contract in the current environment. The image chat request was blocked before reaching the SDK.
errors.imageInputTransportProtocolUnknown: Provider "{{providerName}}" has not resolved the model transport protocol yet, so the correct image message schema cannot be determined. Check the transport result in Model Manager first.

errors.fileInputNotVerifiedByProvider: Provider "{{providerName}}" does not have an officially verified file-input contract in the current environment. The native file request was blocked before reaching the SDK.
errors.fileInputTransportProtocolUnknown: Provider "{{providerName}}" has not resolved the model transport protocol yet, so the correct file message schema cannot be determined. Check the transport result in Model Manager first.

errors.modelToolCallingNotSupported: The current model declares no tool-calling support, so the required tools cannot be injected for this request.

errors.mcpForcedToolCallMissing: MCP auto routing required tool {{tool}} first, but the model produced normal output first ({{kind}}). Check whether the current model or provider supports forced tool calls.

errors.mcpForcedToolUnavailable: MCP auto routing required tool {{tool}} first, but that tool was not injected into this model request. Check the MCP tool injection pipeline.
